## Summary

- Describe the user-facing or maintainer-facing change.
- Mention any important implementation notes or tradeoffs.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests, linting, or verification commands were run locally.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Release notes or `RELEASE_DESCRIPTION` were updated when relevant.

## Verification

List the commands or checks you ran:

```bash
# example:
# make lint
# make test
```

## Notes for Maintainers

Link related issues, call out breaking changes, and mention any follow-up work.
